---
title: "Example article 1"
subtitle: |
  An example article for testing purposes
image: "/imgs/incise2019_reports.jpg"
image-alt: "A stack of copies of the 2019 InCiSE reports"
date: "2024-02-26"
author: "A N OTHER"
categories:
  - example
  - digital
  - country-a

format:
  html:
    toc: true

execute: 
  echo: false
---

Page/article content goes here.

## L2 heading

More content.

### L3 heading

More content, don't go beyond an L3 heading.

Use double **asterisks** to denote bold text. Lighter emphasis is also
available using single *asterisks* but should be avoided.
